metadata.note: Timing/tokens unavailable from subagent notifications in this environment.

notes: Subagent limit was 6, so evals 1-3 and 4-6 were run in two waves instead of all 12 runs simultaneously.
With-skill outputs consistently included stable IDs, layered audit checks, blocked/not-run handling, hard fail rules, and machine-readable artifacts.
Baseline outputs were sometimes useful but less consistent, especially on draft admission and machine-readable/implementation-audit requirements.
Timing and token data were not available in completion notifications, so benchmark excludes time/token metrics.
